snp5.7:1.1: Alone, Sakyan, with nothing to rely on,
snp5.7:1.3: I can’t venture across the great flood.
snp5.7:1.4: Tell me, All-around Eye, the support to rely on
snp5.7:1.5:
for crossing over this flood.
The Buddha:
snp5.7:2.3: relying on ‘There isn’t,’ you should cross over the flood.
snp5.7:2.5:
keep watch for the ending of craving, night & day.
Upasīva:
snp5.7:3.1: One free from passion for all sensuality
snp5.7:3.3: relying on nothingness, letting go of all else,
snp5.7:3.4: released in the highest emancipation of perception:
snp5.7:3.5:
Does he stay there unaffected?
The Buddha:
snp5.7:4.1: One free from passion for all sensuality
snp5.7:4.3: relying on nothingness, letting go of all else,
snp5.7:4.4: released in the highest emancipation of perception:
snp5.7:5.1: If, All-around Eye, he stays there,
snp5.7:5.3: right there would he be cooled & released?
snp5.7:5.4:
Would his consciousness be like that?
The Buddha:
snp5.7:6.1: As a flame overthrown by the force of the wind
snp5.7:6.3: goes to an end that cannot be classified,
snp5.7:6.4: so the sage freed from the name-body
snp5.7:6.5:
goes to an end that cannot be classified.
Upasīva:
snp5.7:7.1:
One who has reached the end:
Does he not exist,
snp5.7:7.2: or is he for eternity free from dis-ease?
snp5.7:7.3: Please, sage, declare this to me
snp5.7:7.4:
as this phenomenon has been known by you.
The Buddha:
snp5.7:8.1: One who has reached the end has no criterion
snp5.7:8.3: by which anyone would say that— for him it doesn’t exist.
snp5.7:8.4: When all phenomena are done away with,
snp5.7:8.5: all means of speaking are done away with as well.
